# MuleSoft Mule Gateway

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version of Mule Gateway documentation.
> See [Mule Gateway llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-gateway/llms-full.txt) for all the Mule Gateway documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Anypoint Platform Gateways](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-gateway/index.md)
